title: BENJEN Compressed Air Duster-150000RPM Electric Air Duster for Cleaning Keyboard & PC Infinitely Adjustable Speed Cordless Turbo Fan Turbo Dryer Blower for Car, Air Bed, Outdoors, Home.
features: Electric Air Duster】The air duster delivers powerful performance with a motor speed of up to 150,000 rpm, air pressure of over 180 grams, and peak wind speeds of over 52 m/s (Super Typhoon ≥ 51.0 m/s). It easily removes dirt from keyboards or electronic devices' crevices, making it convenient for home, office, or car use.

【8000mAh High-capacity Battery】The turbo fan battery features short-circuit protection, over-voltage protection, over-charging protection, over-discharging protection, high-temperature protection, adaptive fast-charging technology, type-C fast-charging interface, and multiple protections.

【Compsite Material】This air duster is crafted from a new composite material. It features high strength, light weight, a non-slip handle for a comfortable grip, and is easy to carry. The product weighs only 0.65 lb. You can put it in your bag, taking up very little space, or even in your pocket, providing users with a better experience.

【Multi-purpose】This turbo dryer blower for cars can be used to clean car seats, snow, water, and leaves. It is suitable for cleaning computer keyboards, laptops, cameras, blinds, etc. The air blaster can also be used for inflating products like inflatable beds and lifeboats. The mini blower can be utilized for picnics, fires, floor cleaning, leaf clearing, and pet hair cleaning. It has powerful functions and numerous usage scenarios.

【About Accessories】When you purchase this product, we will give you a set brush and 2 magnetic suction nozzles. Product accessories and gifts will be sent to users together with the product. If you have any questions about the use of the product, please contact us and we will solve it within 24 hours.
